_comment: Sentry alert rules for humming-server + humming-mobile projects. Free plan disallows API-based rule creation; use this file as a manual checklist when configuring via the Sentry UI (Alerts -> Create Alert). All notifications email heobusy@gmail.com.

alerts.name: Server error rate > 1% over 5min
alerts.notes: If percent_change of error count vs prior period is easier in UI, use that. Goal: catch broken deploys fast.

alerts.name: /analyze p95 latency > 5s over 10min
alerts.notes: Indicates Opus decode or librosa slowdown. p95 budget at MVP = 2s; alarm at 5s = 2.5x degradation.

alerts.name: Deploy failure / first-event crash spike
alerts.notes: Catches new errors >=10 occurrences within first hour. Strong signal a deploy broke something.

alerts.name: Mobile crash-free sessions < 99% over 1h
alerts.notes: Optional but recommended. Skip if free-plan session tracking unavailable.
